tasks.label: clerk-init-existing-project
args: cd /d "c:\VS Code\project01\linkshortenerproject" && npx.cmd --yes clerk@latest init --app app_3F4MKDAU4zcykOPoy7DwOC5rMKL --no-skills

tasks.label: clerk-env-pull
args: cd /d "c:\VS Code\project01\linkshortenerproject" && npx.cmd --yes clerk@latest env pull

tasks.label: install-runtime-db-packages
args: cd /d "c:\VS Code\project01\linkshortenerproject" && npm.cmd i drizzle-orm @neondatabase/serverless dotenv

tasks.label: install-dev-db-packages
args: cd /d "c:\VS Code\project01\linkshortenerproject" && npm.cmd i -D drizzle-kit tsx

tasks.label: check-neon-env-cmd-task
args: if defined NEON_API_KEY (echo NEON_API_KEY=present) else (echo NEON_API_KEY=missing) & if defined DATABASE_URL (echo DATABASE_URL=present) else (echo DATABASE_URL=missing)

tasks.label: neonctl-projects-list-task
args: cd /d "c:\VS Code\project01\linkshortenerproject" && npx.cmd --yes neonctl projects list

tasks.label: neonctl-version-task
args: cd /d "c:\VS Code\project01\linkshortenerproject" && npx.cmd --yes neonctl --version & echo EXITCODE:!errorlevel!

tasks.label: clerk-check-user-id-task
args: cd /d "c:\VS Code\project01\linkshortenerproject" && set DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env && node -r dotenv/config -e "const userId='user_3F9VikbBm4jYFt4yibbxi8t4A74'; const key=process.env.CLERK_SECRET_KEY; if(!key){console.log('found=unknown'); console.log('reason=missing_clerk_secret_key'); process.exit(2);} fetch('https://api.clerk.com/v1/users/'+userId,{headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+key}}).then(async r=>{ if(r.ok){const d=await r.json(); console.log('found=true'); console.log('id='+d.id); console.log('username='+(d.username??'')); console.log('email_count='+(Array.isArray(d.email_addresses)?d.email_addresses.length:0)); console.log('created_at='+d.created_at);} else if(r.status===404){console.log('found=false');} else {console.log('found=unknown'); console.log('status='+r.status); const t=await r.text(); console.log('body='+t.slice(0,200)); process.exit(1);} }).catch(e=>{console.log('found=unknown'); console.log('error='+e.message); process.exit(1);});"

tasks.label: clerk-check-user-id-task-2
args: cd /d "c:\VS Code\project01\linkshortenerproject" && set DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env && node -r dotenv/config -e "const userId=\"user_3F9VikbBm4jYFt4yibbxi8t4A74\"; const key=process.env.CLERK_SECRET_KEY; if(!key){console.log(\"found=unknown\"); console.log(\"reason=missing_clerk_secret_key\"); process.exit(2);} fetch(\"https://api.clerk.com/v1/users/\"+userId,{headers:{Authorization:\"Bearer \"+key}}).then(async r=>{ if(r.ok){const d=await r.json(); console.log(\"found=true\"); console.log(\"id=\"+d.id); console.log(\"username=\"+(d.username??\"\")); console.log(\"email_count=\"+(Array.isArray(d.email_addresses)?d.email_addresses.length:0)); console.log(\"created_at=\"+d.created_at);} else if(r.status===404){console.log(\"found=false\");} else {console.log(\"found=unknown\"); console.log(\"status=\"+r.status); const t=await r.text(); console.log(\"body=\"+t.slice(0,200)); process.exit(1);} }).catch(e=>{console.log(\"found=unknown\"); console.log(\"error=\"+e.message); process.exit(1);});"

tasks.label: clerk-check-user-id-task-3
args: cd /d "c:\VS Code\project01\linkshortenerproject" && set DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env && node -r dotenv/config -e "var userId=\"user_3F9VikbBm4jYFt4yibbxi8t4A74\"; var key=process.env.CLERK_SECRET_KEY; if(!key){console.log(\"found=unknown\"); console.log(\"reason=missing_clerk_secret_key\"); process.exit(2);} fetch(\"https://api.clerk.com/v1/users/\"+userId,{headers:{Authorization:\"Bearer \"+key}}).then(function(r){ if(r.status===404){console.log(\"found=false\"); return null;} if(!r.ok){console.log(\"found=unknown\"); console.log(\"status=\"+r.status); return r.text().then(function(t){console.log(\"body=\"+t.slice(0,200)); process.exit(1);});} return r.json().then(function(d){console.log(\"found=true\"); console.log(\"id=\"+d.id); var ec=Array.isArray(d.email_addresses)?d.email_addresses.length:0; console.log(\"email_count=\"+ec); console.log(\"created_at=\"+d.created_at);});}).catch(function(e){console.log(\"found=unknown\"); console.log(\"error=\"+e.message); process.exit(1);});"
